content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: x-user-id ∧ 401 ∧ auth ∧ path
H: header ∧ override ∧ authz_bypass ⇒ spoof(x-user-id)
P: if ∧ unauthenticated → keep_401 ∧ drop_hdr
V: x-user-id ∧ 401
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: x-user-id and 401 and auth and path.
Hypothesis: header and override and authorization bypass implies spoof(x-user-id).
Plan: if and unauthenticated then keep 401 behavior and drop the header path.
Verify: x-user-id and 401.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: tenantId ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk
H: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ drop_hdr ⇒ keep_401
P: tenantId ∧ header → authz ∧ decision
V: 403 ∧ preserved ∧ denied ∧ spoof ∧ rejected
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !spoof_denied
A: verify ∧ tenantId ∧ header ∧ handling ∧ keep ∧ 403

[AUDIT]
Goal: tenantId and header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: spoof(x-user-id) and drop the header path implies keep 401 behavior.
Plan: tenantId and header then authz and decision.
Verify: 403 and preserved and denied and spoof and rejected.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: verify and tenantId and header and handling and keep and 403.

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: x-role/admin ∧ spoof_denied ∧ drop_hdr ⇒ authz_bypass
P: x-role/admin → verify
V: x-role/admin ∧ keep_401
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !keep_401
A: spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: x-role/admin and spoofed requests denied and drop the header path implies authorization bypass.
Plan: x-role/admin then verify.
Verify: x-role/admin and keep 401 behavior.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: spoofed requests denied.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: x-signature∧401⇒header ∧ auth ∧ risk
P: verify→drop_hdr
V: keep_401∧spoof_denied
R: !spoof_denied∧!drop_hdr
A: authz_bypass

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: x-signature and 401 implies header and auth and risk.
Plan: verify then drop the header path.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Risk: high-risk spoofed requests denied and high-risk drop the header path.
Answer target: authorization bypass.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: returnTo ∧ 302 ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk
H: returnTo ∧ 302 ⇒ auth ∧ redirect ∧ abuse
P: validate/allowlist ∧ returnTo → redirect ∧ target
V: untrusted ∧ returnTo ∧ 302
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !keep_401 ∧ !spoof_denied
A: hdr_override

[AUDIT]
Goal: returnTo and 302 and header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: returnTo and 302 implies auth and redirect and abuse.
Plan: validate/allowlist and returnTo then redirect and target.
Verify: untrusted and returnTo and 302.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior and high-risk spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: header override.

G: header auth risk  
H: if auth depends on `".."/"download"` header value, then missing/forged header can alter access path  
P: reject unauthenticated/malformed header → keep_401 ∧ drop_hdr  
V: authz_bypass ∧ spoof(x-user-id)  
R: !keep_

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: sort ∨ SELECT ∨ header ∧ auth ∧ risk
P: verify → drop_hdr → keep_401
V: spoof_denied
R: !data_tamper ∧ !authz_bypass
A: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: sort or SELECT or header and auth and risk.
Plan: verify then drop the header path then keep 401 behavior.
Verify: spoofed requests denied.
Risk: high-risk data_tamper and high-risk authorization bypass.
Answer target: header override and authorization bypass.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ETag/304 ∧ header ∧ handling
H: ETag ∧ or ∧ 304 ∧ logic ∧ can ∧ enable ∧ cache-based ∧ auth ∧ leakage ∧ or ∧ replay ∧ if ∧ user-specific ∧ headers ∧ are ∧ reused.
P: cached ∧ response→conditional ∧ request→304 ∧ reuse
V: auth/session ∧ headers∧shared ∧ cache ∧ or ∧ validator ∧ reuse
R: !drop_hdr∧!keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: ETag/304 and header and handling.
Hypothesis: ETag and or and 304 and logic and can and enable and cache-based and auth and leakage and or and replay and if and user-specific and headers and are and reused..
Plan: cached and response then conditional and request then 304 and reuse.
Verify: auth/session and headers and shared and cache and or and validator and reuse.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.
